basic.label: Basic (0–25)
basic.meaning: No systematic measurement; no defined water-saving initiatives.
basic.typicalProfile: Facility without metering or monthly tracking.
basic.recommendedNextSteps: Start monthly monitoring, set a baseline and identify top water uses (guest bathrooms, laundry, kitchens).

bronze.label: Bronze (26–50)
bronze.meaning: Partial tracking and basic actions (linen/towel reuse, maintenance).
bronze.typicalProfile: Facility with basic awareness; limited metering.
bronze.recommendedNextSteps: Install meters/smart sub-meters, train staff, fix visible leaks, and set a yearly reduction target.

silver.label: Silver (51–75)
silver.meaning: Active water management; low-flow fixtures and first reuse solutions.
silver.recommendedNextSteps: Introduce rainwater harvesting or greywater reuse for non‑potable uses; schedule regular leak detection.

gold.label: Gold (76–90)
gold.meaning: Advanced efficiency, reuse and continuous monitoring.
gold.typicalProfile: Facility with targets, smart meters and audits.
gold.recommendedNextSteps: Benchmark against peers; expand reuse systems (toilets/irrigation), optimise laundry and kitchen processes.

platinum.label: Platinum (91–100)
platinum.meaning: Exemplary water stewardship and circularity (>20% reused/harvested).
platinum.typicalProfile: Facility with full monitoring and performance verified over time.
platinum.recommendedNextSteps: Maintain performance, certify (e.g., ISO 14001/50001) and share best practices with peers and local community.
